Created attachment 203769
net-mgmt/p5-Net-CIDR: Update to 0.20

Changelog
=========

*   Update to 0.20


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 w/perl 5.28


Notes
=====

This release enables true dual-stack (IPv4/IPv6) support in cidrlookup, which underpins cidr_allow/cidr_deny in Net::Server.
